name: Roast Pork and Sauerkraut
recipeIngredient: 1 rolled pork roast, I used loin
1 onion, sauted in margarine -- until soft/golden
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the pork roast with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
2. Place the pork roast in a Dutch oven.
3. Surround the pork roast with sauerkraut, caraway seeds, and sauted onions.
4. Add 2-3 inches of apple juice over the meat and sauerkraut.
5. Cook, covered, on top of the stove over low heat for 2 1/2-3 hours.
6. Combine applesauce, apricot halves, nutmeg, and cinnamon in a small saucepan.
7. Heat until hot and blend well.
